candidates.name: DoclingDocument tree structure
candidates.description: Pydantic tree-structured unified document representation. Body/furniture separation, reading order via tree, JSON pointer cross-refs. T28 output schema design reference

candidates.name: Backend + Pipeline separation pattern
candidates.description: Backends handle format-specific parsing, pipelines orchestrate processing stages. T28 should separate source extraction from analysis orchestration

candidates.name: Plugin system via pluggy
candidates.description: Third-party extensibility via setuptools entrypoints. OCR, layout, table models. Only needed when T28 has external consumers

candidates.name: docling-mcp as extraction backend
candidates.description: MCP server wrapping docling conversion. T28 could use as document extraction backend instead of building one

candidates.name: ASR pipeline → unified output
candidates.description: Whisper Turbo → DoclingDocument. Same output as PDF/DOCX. Proves the unified extraction output thesis T28 is pursuing

candidates.name: Use docling instead of building document extractors
candidates.description: Docling already solves PDF, DOCX, PPTX, HTML, audio, images, LaTeX. Delegate via docling-mcp, build only what docling doesn't cover

candidates.name: Serializer hierarchy pattern
candidates.description: BaseDocSerializer → per-format serializers. Per-component serializers (text, table, picture). T28 export layer reference

candidates.name: Enrichment pipeline (toggleable)
candidates.description: Optional post-processing steps: code understanding, formula parsing, picture classification. Pattern for T28 analysis depth options

candidates.name: Thread-safe pipeline design
candidates.description: Per-run isolation, bounded queues, back-pressure, deterministic shutdown. Production engineering reference

candidates.name: InputFormat enum (17 types)
candidates.description: Compare with unstructured's FileType enum. Docling's is simpler (just string enum) but paired with FormatOption mapping

candidates.name: Don't replicate multi-package split prematurely
candidates.description: 5 packages makes sense for a library ecosystem with 57K stars. T28 has one user — start monolithic

candidates.name: Don't build plugin system before you have plugins
candidates.description: pluggy exists because docling has real third-party contributors. Build hardcoded extractors first, plugins later

candidates.name: Don't adopt DoclingDocument wholesale
candidates.description: DoclingDocument is optimized for single-document representation. T28 needs cross-source analysis schema. Study the tree pattern, design your own

cross_repo_connections.detail: Direct competitor. Both solve multi-format → unified output. Docling has richer output (tree vs flat), plugin system, VLM/ASR. Unstructured has more connectors (40+ via unstructured-ingest). Docling is newer, faster-growing (57K vs 14K stars)
Both use Whisper for audio. Docling's ASR pipeline wraps Whisper into DoclingDocument. Bulk-transcribe is YouTube-specific
Bedrock uses AWS-managed extraction. Docling provides open-source alternative with local execution
Reader handles URL→text extraction. Docling handles document→DoclingDocument. Together they cover documents + web — both gaps in T28
